description: Configure product recommendations for the 'Smartphone Ultra' (SKU: PHONE-001). Set 'Wireless Headphones' (HEADPHONES-001) and 'Insulated Water Bottle' (BOTTLE-001) as Related Products. Set 'Business Laptop Pro' (LAPTOP-001) as Up-Sell Products. Set 'LED Desk Lamp' (LAMP-001), 'Classic Cotton T-Shirt' (TSHIRT-001), and 'Yoga Mat Premium' (YOGA-001) as Cross-Sell Products. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
